items.title: Google’s AI search is so broken it can ‘disregard’ what you’re looking for

items.title: Elon, stop trying to make Grok happen
items.description: There is a harsh truth about Elon Musk's "truth-seeking" AI chatbot Grok: It's not very good, and not many people are using it. That's the takeaway of a new Reuters report, which found that Grok barely appears in federal records of how the US government used AI last year. It's not the only sign xAI'...
